task.title: User Authentication Service (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
task.description: Implement core authentication and authorization service with JWT tokens, user registration, login, and session management
task.details: Design user schema and database migrations, Implement gRPC service definitions, Create user registration with email verification, Implement login with password hashing, Generate and validate JWT tokens, Implement refresh token rotation, Add password reset functionality, Create admin user management endpoints
